title: From Dugout to Home Run: How the Rays Scaled Analytics with Snowflake & Coalesce
abstract: The Tampa Bay Rays’ business analytics team stepped up to the plate with a major data challenge — silos, slow reporting and inefficiencies were holding them back. By migrating to Snowflake and leveraging Coalesce, they turned their data game around, cutting development time by 75% and improving reliability across ticketing, marketing and fan engagement. Join this session to learn how a small but mighty team built a scalable, automated analytics powerhouse that keeps the entire organization ahead of the curve.

Recommendations (Rule Based): Data Architectures, including Lakehouse, Mesh, Lake and Warehouse (Topic)

speakers.bio: Born and raised in Caracas, Venezuela. Currently lead the design and implementation of the Tampa Bay Rays' data strategy for their Business Operations.

Brennan DiChiara is currently the Vice President of Business Strategy & Analytics for the Tampa Bay Rays. He leads efforts to leverage data and analytics to inform strategic decision-making and drive growth across different functions of the business including ticketing, marketing, partnerships, and operations. Brennan has over 10 years of experience in the sports industry, working for the Tampa Bay Rays, Buffalo Bills & Sabres, and the Texas Rangers. Prior to working in sports, Brennan began his career as an actuary with Blue Cross Blue Shield of Texas. He has a degree in Mathematics from Southern Nazarene University in Oklahoma where he played football.

title: Hands-on Data Engineering with Snowflake in an Open Architecture
abstract: Discover how to leverage Snowflake's advanced capabilities to build enterprise-grade data engineering solutions in this hands-on session. Participants will gain practical experience in constructing a complete Open Data Lake pipeline in a lakehouse architecture. Bronze layer: Real-time ingestion from streaming sources and databases Silver layer: Build processing pipelines with Dynamic Tables for data refinement Gold layer: Create curated data with Snowpark and Snowflake Notebooks

speakers.bio: I started my journet in code migrations from legacy mainframes to cloud platforms, and eventually transitioned over time to data engineering and data science. Really enjoy finding new ways to build great thinks with Snowflake and Snowpark

Naga Mahadevan is a Principal Solutions Architect at Snowflake Professional Services, specializing in data engineering and Data Lake workloads. His expertise spans the full data lifecycle, from initial BI development to complex cloud migrations and modern data platform implementations. Naga partners with Fortune 500 clients to drive impactful data modernization initiatives on Snowflake.

title: How ANA Built a Single Source of Truth with Snowflake and Apache Iceberg™
abstract: All Nippon Airways (ANA), Japan’s largest airline, boosted performance by 62% by migrating from parquet external tables to Snowflake Managed Iceberg, establishing a Single Source of Truth. Using Snowflake Notebook, they built a custom ETL connector in three days at $10/month. They also utilize Cortex ML with a custom dbt Materialization, enabling everyone to perform ML operations. In this session,hear from Mr. Ioka and Mr. Matsuura on how Snowflake powers ANA’s “BlueLake,” serving 40,000 users.

Recommendations (Rule Based): Data Architectures, including Lakehouse, Mesh, Lake and Warehouse (Topic)

speakers.bio: I started my career with ANA in 2020 as a new graduate, serving as ground staff at Narita International Airport in international passenger services. In 2021, I transitioned to my current team, where I oversaw the in-house development of a data catalog. Today, I focus on designing and building data platforms and analytics environments, as well as planning and implementing data governance strategies.

I have led the creation and promotion of a customer information sharing platform aimed at enhancing customer experience, advanced our digital marketing capabilities, and encouraged data utilization on the front lines. Currently, I am spearheading data management initiatives across the entire ANA Group

title: How Block Scales Storage Management in Snowflake
abstract: Learn how Block leveraged Streamlit in Snowflake to create an intuitive self-service application that empowers users to efficiently manage their data storage lifecycle. This solution automated table retention policies, optimized storage costs and enhanced data governance while reducing administrative overhead. Block will dive into the architecture, implementation challenges and best practices that enabled it to scale this solution across the organization.

speakers.bio: Jason Snyder is a Principal Solutions Architect at Snowflake, where he partners with leading Financial Services organizations to drive their data and analytics transformation initiatives. With over 15 years of experience in enterprise technology and data warehousing, Jason specializes in helping firms modernize their data architecture, optimize analytics workflows, and leverage cloud-native solutions to unlock business value.

Currently serving as the Data Analytics Platform Lead within Block's Foundational Engineering team, Rajeeb Pattanayak brings a wealth of experience to his role. With a primary focus on managing the Snowflake platform, he has spearheaded the development of self-service applications tailored for internal users, significantly enhancing efficiency. His expertise and strategic insights are pivotal in shaping Block's data infrastructure for optimal performance and fostering innovation.

title: How Clover Moves at the Speed of Money with Striim and Snowflake
abstract: Clover's POS relied on slow batch data, hindering timely decisions on inventory, staffing and finances. Partnering with Striim, they implemented real-time data streaming from MySQL to Snowflake on Google Cloud. This shift provided instant insights into sales trends, stock levels and workforce needs. The outcome: accelerated decision-making, streamlined operations and improved cash flow. This modern, automated data pipeline delivers actionable, up-to-the-minute analytics, revolutionizing POS industry efficiency.

speakers.bio: A Data Platform Techy, I build and maintain secure, high-performance data infrastructure and pipelines, including robust data movements between various platforms. I also proactively investigate and assess emerging AI technologies to unlock opportunities for enhancing our data capabilities and driving organizational value.

John Kutay is Director of Product & Engineering for Data & AI at Striim, where he leads cross-functional teams building real-time data infrastructure and AI-driven products. With a background spanning software engineering, product management, and venture investing, John brings a multidisciplinary perspective to solving complex data problems. He is also the host of What’s New in Data, a podcast with thousands of global listeners, where he explores emerging trends at the intersection of data, AI, and infrastructure. John has over a decade of experience in streaming data systems, from academic research to driving innovation at Striim.

title: Informative Gen AI Blueprint for Building AI Agents with Snowflake Cortex AI
abstract: With Informatica's Intelligent Data Management Cloud platform, enterprises can establish a strong data foundation that integrates clean and trusted data from disparate sources from across the enterprise to ensure precision and relevance in AI-driven responses. In this session, via a live demo, we will showcase how Informatica's generative AI blueprint supports the development of enterprise-grade generative AI solutions using Snowflake Cortex AI by enhancing and contextualizing prompts with business-specific semantics and metadata.

Along with customer obsession, he has a passion for data and cloud technologies, and riding his Harley.

title: Sharing Data Across Cloud Providers with Snowflake and Apache Iceberg™ at PayPal
abstract: PayPal has multiple cloud providers for data and reporting workloads. Learn how we shared our Snowflake generated data with multiple cloud providers without typical ETL processes by leveraging a Snowflake managed Apache Iceberg catalog, replication, and dynamic tables.

Recommendations (Rule Based): Data Architectures, including Lakehouse, Mesh, Lake and Warehouse (Topic)

speakers.bio: Cory is a Principal Engineer at PayPal where he works on critical systems that pay customers and reporting infrastructure to help everyone make sense of data. A rustacean at heart, he wishes he could use more Rust in Snowflake.

title: The Collaboration Revolution with Clean Rooms and AI
abstract: Data clean rooms are rapidly evolving from privacy-preserving data collaboration environments into powerful engines for AI- and ML-driven insights. This session will dive into the technical architecture and product capabilities enabling clean rooms to support advanced use cases across the marketing lifecycle — from identity resolution and lookalike modeling to cross-channel attribution and real-time optimization. Beyond advertising, we’ll examine how these innovations are scaling into verticals like retail and healthcare, where secure data collaboration is unlocking next-gen personalization, predictive analytics and clinical insights.

speakers.bio: Ankur Abhishek is a Senior Product Manager leading Data Clean Rooms at Snowflake. Prior to Snowflake, Ankur was at Samooha (acquired by Snowflake) and LinkedIn where he worked on a range of privacy-preserving products within the Marketing & Advertising vertical.

Ashwin leads product management for Snowflake Data Clean Rooms. Prior to Snowflake, Ashwin was a Group Product Manager at Adobe leading their Real-time Customer Data Platform product. Previously, Ashwin also worked at various big data companies as a Product Manager and Engineer.

title: The Future of Data Analytics and DevSecOps
abstract: Unlock the full potential of your software development data by combining GitLab's comprehensive DevSecOps platform with Snowflake's powerful analytics capabilities. In this presentation, discover how leading organizations leverage this powerful combination to drive security intelligence across their software lifecycle. Learn how to transform raw security events, issue tracking data, and turn CI/CD metrics into actionable insights that enable proactive risk management and enhanced decision-making.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

speakers.bio: At Snowflake, I lead the charge in transforming cloud operations, ensuring seamless delivery of cutting-edge data solutions. With a focus on automation and SRE principles, I maximize efficiency and minimize risk, enabling our customers to unlock the full potential of their data.

Amie Bright is the Vice President of Enterprise Data & Insights at GitLab. She is responsible for converting data into tangible value for the organization by overseeing data engineering, analytics engineering, data science, advanced analytics, data governance, and data quality. With more than 15 years of experience as a data leader, Amie excels in aligning data and AI strategies with organizational visions and harnessing state-of-the-art cloud technologies throughout the entire data lifecycle—from ingestion to AI-powered analytics.

title: Transforming Investment Research: Snowpark Powers 90% Faster Asset Resolution
abstract: BlackRock, the world's largest asset manager, uses Snowpark to create a Java-based asset resolution service for maintaining data on millions of securities and assets. This service, utilizing Python UDFs and proprietary name stemming algorithms, significantly improves the speed and accuracy of asset resolution. After implementing Snowpark, the service resolved over 2 billion timeseries in approximately 20 minutes, compared to eight-plus hours with the previous API-based solution.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

speakers.bio: Prashant Mehta is a Senior Director and Head of Alpha Product Engineering at Blackrock, leading the data and platform strategy for next-generation cloud based analytics platform supporting investment research and alpha generation. His team empowers quant research with seamless data, advanced tools, and enhanced model management to accelerate investment outcomes. He has extensive experience working with investors from systematic and fundamental teams to bring data-driven (including AI/ML) strategies to market, leveraging data to boost decision-making, efficiency and growth. With 25+ years in data, he is deeply passionate about modern data and analytics tools and emerging tech.

Geoffrey Urlanda is a seasoned professional with over 19 years of experience working with data. As the lead technical architect of BlackRock's Alpha Engineering data capabilities, Geoffrey has been instrumental in developing and supporting data processing pipelines using cutting-edge technologies including Snowflake. With a strong background in data engineering, Geoffrey has successfully led the migration of on-prem data resources to the cloud, enabling seamless data discovery and sharing. Geoffrey's contributions have significantly improved time-to-market for research signals. His dedication to innovation and excellence continues to drive BlackRock's data capabilities forward.

title: Unifying Open Data: Catalog Federation for Apache Polaris
abstract: Open source data lakes are growing, but fragmentation limits accessibility. Apache Polaris's catalog federation bridges this gap, enabling seamless data discovery and governance across multiple open formats and platforms. This session explores how federation empowers users to unify metadata, query distributed data sets and maintain interoperability — without vendor lock-in. Learn best practices to maximize Polaris for an open and connected data ecosystem.

Note: Theaters are first come, first seated

abstract: Learn how to streamline governance and security for data and AI with Snowflake's latest updates to Horizon Catalog. Raja has a master’s degree from Carnegie Mellon University.

speakers.bio: Nimesh is the Product Manager leading Snowpark at Snowflake. Passionate about blending powerful infrastructure with intuitive user experiences, Nimesh is dedicated to helping businesses and developers build at scale with speed and efficiency.

Doris Lee leads Python and data science experience across Snowflake's products. title: WHOOP Genie: Chat Application for Enterprise Data
abstract: WHOOP has worked toward building an enterprisewide chat application for all employees throughout their organization. The application utilizes an agentic approach incorporating Snowflake features such as Cortex Analyst, Cortex Search, Cortex Agents and various LLM functions. Come learn more about this innovative generative AI agentic solution.

Under his leadership, WHOOP has advanced its analytics capabilities, from optimizing data infrastructure in Snowflake to pioneering AI-driven solutions like an LLM-powered chat interface for real-time insights. Passionate about pushing the boundaries of what’s possible, Matt is committed to keeping WHOOP at the forefront of analytics and data science, shaping the future of how organizations leverage data for smarter decision-making.

Brendan is a Senior Solution Engineer at Snowflake and based out of Boston, MA. He has been with Snowflake since 2021 and has primarily worked with Snowflake customers in the Technology and Financial Services industries.

title: Snowbash
abstract: Summit reception party.

title: SnowPro Certification (Thursday)

title: Build and Deploy Visual Language Models for Unstructured Data Processing
abstract: In this hands-on lab, you’ll deploy visual language models (VLMs) using Snowpark containers to process unstructured, multi-modal data such as images and videos. Learn how VLMs enhance AI assistants and RAG workloads by extracting meaningful insights from these types of complex data. We will review best practices for deploying VLMs in Snowflake, managing governance, and integrating AI-driven image analysis into enterprise workflows. By the end of the session, you’ll have a fully functional VLM-powered pipeline that processes images and generates intelligent insights — all securely within Snowflake.

speakers.bio: Product Manager with Snowpark Container Services
Yavor is a PM at Snowflake working on developer experience for container-based workloads. Previously at Docker, Auth0, Hulu, and Microsoft Azure.

title: Building Resilient, Scalable Native Apps with Snowpark Container Services
abstract: Snowflake Native Apps built with Snowpark Container Services unlock powerful new capabilities, enabling developers to build virtually anything they can imagine. However, ensuring these applications are reliable, observable and resilient requires a deep understanding of how the Snowflake Native App Framework and Snowpark Container Services work together. Join this session to build a Snowflake Native App with Snowpark Container Services. This session will also dive into the key details and patterns essential for building resilient, observable containerized services on the Snowflake Native Apps platform.

speakers.bio: Charles Yorek has spent the last 20 years working in various capacities ranging from consulting to his current role as a Principal Architect in the Field CTO group at Snowflake. During this time he has always been focused on enterprise information management from implementing full Enterprise Data Warehouses to building a custom software development practice focused on delivering data centric products. He has been with Snowflake for 5 years and is currently focused on helping Snowflake customers and partners achieve success bringing their application workloads to the Snowflake platform.

Rachel is a Principal Architect on the Solution Innovation Team specializing in AI/ML. She has been working in the business intelligence and data architecture industry for over 25 years. Rachel holds several patents on Snowflake data privacy capabilities.

title: Business Transformation with Data and AI: The Story of a CEO
abstract: Retail business is competitive, but AI-led transformation offers immense potential. This demo-story session showcases a retail CEO overcoming fragmented data challenges to drive actionable insights with analytics and AI, powered by Snowflake and Microsoft. Learn how Microsoft technologies like Fabric, Power BI and Microsoft 365 Copilot work with Snowflake enabling data estate unification, advanced analytics and innovative AI development. Join us for inspiration to unlock your data's potential with cutting-edge AI and cloud solutions.
